final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustrated long-scroll artwork depicting the Lantern Festival night panorama of Chang'an City in the Tang Dynasty, with ten thousand flower lanterns illuminating the night sky.

Style/medium: gongbi (工笔) meticulous brushwork with heavy mineral pigments (重彩), horizontal hand-scroll (长卷) format, referencing the tradition of Tang court painting — rich layered color washes over precise ink outlines, silk-textured ground
Composition: sweeping panoramic horizontal composition, bird's-eye to mid-level perspective, continuous scroll layout revealing the full breadth of Chang'an's main boulevard and surrounding districts, deep spatial recession
Subject: vast Tang Dynasty Chang'an cityscape at the Lantern Festival (元宵灯会) — thousands of ornate flower lanterns (花灯) in lotus, palace-lantern, and dragon forms suspended from archways, trees, and pavilion eaves; crowds of Tang-costumed figures strolling, dancing, and watching; imperial palace silhouette in the far distance
Scene/backdrop: night scene, Tang Dynasty Chang'an city streets and plazas, monumental city gates and vermilion-walled compounds, willow trees strung with lanterns, full moon overhead
Lighting/mood: warm amber and golden lantern glow as dominant light source, ten thousand points of light reflected on stone pavements and silk garments, festive and magnificent atmosphere, deep indigo night sky contrasting with the blaze of lantern light
Color palette: deep indigo and ink-black night sky anchoring the composition, warm gold and amber lantern light as the primary luminous accent, vermilion architectural elements, malachite green and azurite blue in costumes and foliage, white lead highlights on figures
Materials/textures: fine silk scroll ground implied, visible mineral pigment layering, precise ink-line outlines (白描) beneath color washes, architectural details rendered with ruled-line (界画) precision
Avoid: Western oil-painting chiaroscuro, anime or manga stylization, flat modern illustration, watercolor looseness, photorealistic rendering, gradient glows, stuffer aesthetic
